title: Voices for Hope
text:
Voices for Hope - SupportGoWhere
Voices for Hope
Share link
Empowers persons with dementia and their caregivers to step up and speak up as self-advocates to promote greater acceptance of individuals who are coping with dementia.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based, Online
Free
Referral not required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

A 10-week programme that equips participants with relevant skills and fosters confidence in them to actively share their stories, their needs and views publicly.

Who is this for?

Persons with Dementia and their caregivers

What to expect?

The programme staff will contact you to assess your suitability and inform you of the date and time for the upcoming session.

How to apply?

You may write to voicesforhope@dementia.org.sg or call 6377 0700.

Information last updated on 23 Sep 2025
